name: Juané Schoeman
title: BSc Honours Student — Computer Science & IT
greeting: ✦ Welcome to my corner of the universe
bio: Detail-oriented and adaptable IT student with strong skills in Java, C#(.NET), and SQL. Gained hands-on experience during a software development internship, including data management and working in agile teams. Known for analytical thinking, precision, and a strong work ethic. Eager to apply my back-end and database knowledge to real-world software solutions.

description: Assisted in developing a website feature using Angular.
Organised business data in Excel and maintained data accuracy across systems.
Participated in daily team meetings and gained exposure to real-world agile workflows.
Marked practical assignments for the Introduction to Programming course.
Assisted students with practical work and provided one-on-one academic support.
Supervised tests and gained experience in assessment and exam invigilation.
Filled prescriptions and restocked medications as part of a practical pharmacy project.
Developed precision and adherence to strict procedures in a regulated healthcare environment.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science Honours in Computer Science and Information Technology

description: Volunteered every December from 2021 to 2025 (full month each year) at the annual Liggiefees event.
Assisted customers and sold toys at a stall, providing friendly and helpful service to visitors.
Gained experience in customer service, communication, and sales in a busy event environment.
